name: Egg Omelet
instructions: Beat 2 eggs, add salt and pepper. Heat butter in a pan, pour eggs and fold when cooked. Serve hot.

name: Chicken Soup
instructions: Boil chicken in water with carrots, celery, and onions for 45 minutes. Season with salt and pepper. Add noodles if desired.

name: Spaghetti Bolognese
instructions: Brown 400g minced beef with a chopped onion and 2 garlic cloves. Add a can of crushed tomatoes, 2 tbsp tomato paste, salt, pepper, and dried oregano. Simmer for 20 minutes. Cook spaghetti al dente, drain, and serve topped with the sauce and grated Parmesan.

name: Tomato Basil Soup
instructions: Sauté a chopped onion and 2 garlic cloves in olive oil until soft. Add 600g chopped tomatoes and 400ml vegetable broth. Simmer 20 minutes, then blend until smooth. Stir in fresh basil, salt, and pepper. Serve with crusty bread.

name: Banana Pancakes
instructions: Mash 2 ripe bananas in a bowl. Mix in 2 eggs, 1/2 cup flour, 1/2 cup milk, and a pinch of salt until smooth. Heat a lightly buttered pan over medium heat. Pour small ladles of batter and cook until bubbles form, then flip. Serve with honey or maple syrup.

name: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
instructions: Butter one side of each of 2 bread slices. Place one slice butter-side-down in a pan over medium heat. Layer with 2 slices of cheese. Top with the second slice butter-side-up. Cook 3 minutes per side until golden and the cheese has melted. Serve immediately.

name: Chicken Stir-Fry
instructions: Slice 500g chicken breast thin. Heat oil in a wok over high heat, cook chicken 5 minutes. Add sliced bell peppers, carrots, and broccoli. Stir-fry 4 minutes. Mix 3 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp oyster sauce, and 1 tsp sesame oil; pour over. Toss well and serve over steamed rice.

name: Apple Cinnamon Oatmeal
instructions: Bring 2 cups of milk to a gentle simmer. Stir in 1 cup rolled oats and cook 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. Dice 1 apple and add it along with 1 tsp cinnamon and a pinch of salt. Cook 2 more minutes. Sweeten with honey and serve warm.

name: Vegetable Stew
instructions: Dice and sauté an onion and 2 garlic cloves in olive oil. Add diced potatoes, carrots, celery, and zucchini. Pour in 600ml vegetable broth and a can of diced tomatoes. Season with thyme, rosemary, salt, and pepper. Simmer 30 minutes until vegetables are tender.

name: Caprese Salad
instructions: Slice 3 large tomatoes and 200g fresh mozzarella into rounds. Alternate tomato and mozzarella slices on a plate. Tuck fresh basil leaves between slices. Drizzle with extra-virgin olive oil and balsamic glaze. Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper.

name: Pasta Carbonara
instructions: Boil spaghetti in salted water. Meanwhile, cook bacon in a pan until lightly browned. In a bowl, whisk eggs with sour cream and grated Parmesan. Drain pasta and immediately toss with the bacon, egg mixture, salt, and pepper. Finish with extra Parmesan.

name: Pasta with Tomato and Mushroom Sauce
instructions: Boil pasta in salted water. Sauté a chopped onion, then add mushrooms (fresh or canned) and cook until tender. Stir in tomato sauce and simmer until creamy. Drain pasta and mix with the sauce. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan to serve.

name: Green Salad with Tuna and Corn
instructions: Wash and tear lettuce leaves into a bowl. Drain the canned tuna and corn, then add them to the salad. Drizzle with olive oil and freshly squeezed lemon juice. Season with salt and toss gently to combine.

name: Cheese and Herb Omelet
instructions: Beat 3–4 eggs in a deep bowl. Stir in grated cheese and finely chopped fresh herbs (spring onion, green garlic, or dill). Season with salt. Heat a drizzle of extra-virgin olive oil in a pan, pour in the mixture, and cook over medium heat for about 15 minutes until set.

name: Asian-Style Rice with Chicken
instructions: Cook rice in a rice cooker with 2 tbsp oil and water according to package directions. Meanwhile, grill chicken breast on a grill pan until cooked through. Dice the chicken into small cubes. When rice is done, mix with the chicken and drizzle soy sauce to taste.

name: Turkey Breast on a Bed of Vegetables
instructions: Line a baking tray with parchment paper. Spread frozen vegetables over it and drizzle with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Lay turkey breast slices on top and season with salt. Bake in a preheated oven until the turkey is golden and cooked through. Optionally use fresh vegetables sliced into rounds and seasoned with herbs.

name: Cream of Mushroom Soup
instructions: Clean 1 kg of champignon mushrooms and boil them until tender. Finely chop one large onion. Drain the mushrooms and place them in a blender together with the onion and cooking cream. Blend until smooth and creamy. Season with salt and pepper to taste.

name: Chicken and Cheese Puff Pastry Braid
instructions: Dice chicken breast into small cubes and lightly brown in a pan. Roll out puff pastry dough. Place the chicken, canned mushrooms, and grated cheese down the center. Season with salt and pepper. Fold the dough over in a braid shape, brush the top with beaten egg, and bake until golden and crispy.

name: Flatbread Pizza
instructions: Place flatbreads on a parchment-lined baking tray. Spread tomato sauce over each one. Top with salami, bacon, mushrooms, olives, and corn to taste. Sprinkle generously with grated cheese. Bake in a preheated oven until the cheese is melted and bubbly.

name: Chicken Skewers in a Pan
instructions: Thread cubed chicken breast, red bell pepper, mushrooms, cherry tomatoes, olives, and onion onto skewer sticks. Season with a pinch of salt. Cook the skewers in a grill pan, turning occasionally, until the chicken is browned and cooked through.

name: Crispy Sandwich
instructions: Toast 2 slices of bread, then spread with butter. Layer with pressed ham and plenty of cheese slices. Add fresh lettuce, sliced cucumber, or red bell pepper for freshness. Top with grated cheese and bake in the oven on a flat tray for about 10 minutes until the cheese has melted.

name: French Potato Pudding
instructions: Wash and dice potatoes into small cubes; boil until tender. Transfer to an oven-safe dish and mix with grated telemea (feta-style) cheese, well-beaten eggs, butter, and a pinch of salt. Bake in the oven until the top is nicely browned.

name: Rice with Mexican Vegetables
instructions: Boil long-grain rice in salted water until cooked. Meanwhile, sauté fresh or frozen mixed vegetables in a pan with a knob of butter until tender. Combine the cooked rice and vegetables, season with salt and pepper, and serve hot.

name: Chicken with Mushrooms in Cream Sauce
instructions:
Cut the chicken breast into cubes. In a pan with oil, brown the meat over medium heat, stirring frequently. Remove the chicken to a plate.
In the same pan, sauté the finely chopped onion for 2-3 minutes. Add the sliced mushrooms, season with salt and pepper, and cook until golden.
Pour in 400 ml of heavy cream and cook for a few minutes until the sauce thickens slightly.
Add the chicken back and stir well. Sprinkle with freshly chopped parsley, cover with a lid, and leave for 2-3 minutes. Serve warm.

name: Pork and Potato Stew
instructions:
Cut the pork neck into cubes and coat them in flour. Place in a pot together with the diced smoked bacon and a little oil. Brown the meat well on all sides, then set aside.
In the same oil, sauté the diced onion for 2 minutes. Add the minced garlic and sliced carrot, and sauté for another 1-2 minutes.
Add the tomato sauce, browned meat, and 500 ml of clear broth or water. Season with salt, pepper, and a bay leaf. Cover and cook over low heat for 1 hour.
Add the diced potatoes and cook for another 20 minutes or until tender. Serve warm.

name: Oven-Baked Chicken with Potatoes
instructions:
Peel and slice the potatoes (≈0.5 cm thick). Toss in a bowl with olive oil, salt, and thyme.
Pour 2-3 tbsp of olive oil into a baking tray. Slice the 4 onions and spread them evenly in the tray. Layer the seasoned potatoes on top.
Blend the garlic (5 cloves), milk, sunflower oil, tomato paste, paprika, thyme, salt, and pepper until you get a smooth sauce.
Place the chicken thighs over the potatoes, pour the sauce over the meat, and tuck in the asparagus and the whole garlic head.
Bake at 220°C for 60 minutes. Serve immediately.
